entry.title: New: CR 24-75 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending ADOPTION of Resolution 24-109, CD1, to approve the appointments of Randol Leach to the Board of Ethics; Jeffrey Steven Borge to the Board of Water Supply; Benjamin Ray Ostrander (Reappoint, Lāna‛i) to the Conservation Planning Committee; Joaquin Perreira Freitas, Jr. to the Cost of Government Commission; Chase Leigh Traphagen (Reappoint) to the Council on Aging; John “Keone” Edward Ball to the Fire and Public Safety Commission; Richard Bruce Woodford to the Liquor Control Commission; Keʻeaumoku J. Kapu (Reappoint) to the Maui County Cultural Resources Commission; Rebecca Lopez (Reappoint) to the Pā‛ia-Ha‛ikū Advisory Committee to Maui Planning Commission; Shane Keala Awai (Alternate) and Steven James Notman (Alternate) to the Public Works Commission; Clint Leslie Hansen and Brian Thomas Ward to the South Maui Advisory Committee to Maui Planning Commission; and disapproving the appointments of Monroe Thomas Bryce to the Board of Water Supply; Christopher Jesse Imbach to the Board of Water Supply; Dale Brian Bonar to the Conservation Planning Committee; Jake Dylan Musson to the Cost of Government Commission; Bruce Hiwahiwa Uʻu to the Fire and Public Safety Commission; CarolLee Lani Puana Kamekona to the Maui County Cultural Resources Commission; Jared Sam Puyaoan Agtunong to the Maui Redevelopment Agency; Josiah Kaleo Ching to the Molokai Planning Commission; Jessica Wai Han Parker to the Molokai Planning Commission; Charla Ann Zewzetta Kahealani Konohia to the Pā‛ia-Ha‛ikū Advisory Committee to Maui Planning Commission; Kevin Kaonohi Keʻa to the Public Works Commission; and Fujio Cullen Tsuneoka to the Urban Design Review Board.

Government Relations, Ethics, and Transparency Committee (2023-2025)

View on the council site
